hero.kicker: Personal Life & Wellness · Ansiversa mini app
hero.title: Language Learning Buddy
hero.description: Build a vocabulary list, record practice sessions, and review learning progress in a focused daily language workflow.

flow.title: Vocabulary → Practice → Progress
steps: Review progress by language and difficulty

differences.title: Keep vocabulary and practice connected
differences.description: Language Learning Buddy focuses on owner-scoped vocabulary records and factual practice history without external AI, generated lessons, or browser storage.

items.title: Vocabulary records
items.description: Create editable words and translations with language, category, difficulty, and notes.

items.title: Practice sessions
items.description: Record result, confidence, date, and notes against saved vocabulary.

items.title: Progress review
items.description: Review counts, recent sessions, mastered words, and weekly practice.

feel.title: A clear language-learning routine
feel.description: The workflow keeps word collection, practice history, and progress review close together.

items.title: Create vocabulary
items.description: Add words and translations you want to remember.

items.title: Practice a word
items.description: Record how a practice attempt went.

items.title: Review progress
items.description: See recent practice and learning status.

audiences.title: Who uses Language Learning Buddy
audiences.description: Useful for learners who want a simple personal vocabulary and practice log inside Ansiversa.

items.title: Language learners
items.description: Make language practice part of each day.

items.title: Routine builders
items.description: Keep daily learning focused and consistent.

items.title: Everyday users
items.description: Practice language through a clear routine.

resourceSection.title: Language-learning essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep vocabulary, practice, and progress connected.

items.title: Vocabulary
items.description: Store words, translations, language, category, and difficulty.

items.title: Practice
items.description: Record dated practice sessions with result and confidence.

items.title: Progress
items.description: Review recent practice and learning status.

groupedSection.title: Practice language with structure
groupedSection.description: Use one protected workflow for vocabulary records and practice history.

items.name: Context
items.description: Group entries by language, category, and difficulty.

items.name: Progress
items.description: Review recent practice and mastered vocabulary.

technicalSection.title: Built for owner-scoped language practice
technicalSection.description: Language Learning Buddy follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: Protected vocabulary, practice, and progress workflow.
Dedicated backend database with no browser storage persistence.

finalCta.title: Ready to build vocabulary?
finalCta.description: Open Language Learning Buddy and create the first vocabulary record.
